backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the wine catalogue backend with user profile management, CRUD operations for wines (with access control), and blob storage mixins. Enforces role-based permissions (admin/user) for all operations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding an optional `year` field to all existing Wine records, defaulting it to `null`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering year/vintage field addition, logo update, PDF export, and related frontend changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Naturavini wine catalogue app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens used throughout the shadcn/ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Naturavini React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing PageHeader, WineList, a footer with dynamic year and caffeine.ai attribution, and the Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/DeleteWineDialog: AlertDialog confirmation component for deleting a wine entry, displaying the wine name and winery with confirm/cancel actions and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Olive green page header rendering the Natura Vini v2 logo image with an `onError` fallback to plain text, plus an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/WineFormModal.ts: A modal dialog component for adding or editing a wine entry, containing a form with fields for country, winery, wine name, style, price, and other details, with basic validation.
frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx: Displays the full wine catalogue in a sortable table grouped by country, with admin controls for adding, editing, and deleting wines, plus PDF export functionality via jsPDF loaded from CDN.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting wines via the ICP backend actor, with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Playfair Display and Inter fonts, defines Tailwind CSS custom design tokens (colors, radius) for light and dark themes, and adds utility component classes for the wine catalogue UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WineList.tsx: The main wine list page that renders a header with an admin mode indicator and the WineTable component, constrained to a max-width layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors, fonts, border radius, shadows, keyframes) using OKLCH CSS variables, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and image requirements for the Naturavini wine price list app.
